metadata.title: Style Tags in Search Results
metadata.description: Style Tags in Search Results Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Added to wrapped hashtags alongside the stable 'stisr-tag'. Style via CSS/snippets.
ast.target: 添加到包装的标签旁边，与稳定的 'stisr-tag' 一起。通过 CSS/代码片段设置样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Performance tuning for large result sets.
ast.target: 针对大型结果集的性能调优。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pre-wrap rows before they enter the viewport. Increase to reduce flicker while scrolling fast.
ast.target: 在行进入视口之前预先包装它们。增加此值以减少快速滚动时的闪烁。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在搜索中隐藏包装的标签
